lines.name: Foulborn Unnatural Instinct

mutatedModifiers.text: Allocated Notable Passive Skills in Radius grant nothing
Grants all bonuses of Unallocated Notable Passive Skills in Radius

lines.flavourText:
"I don't know how I know, 
I just know that I know."

lines.name: Foulborn Unnatural Instinct

explicitModifiers.text: Allocated Small Passive Skills in Radius grant nothing

mutatedModifiers.text: Grants all bonuses of Unallocated Notable Passive Skills in Radius

lines.flavourText:
"I don't know how I know, 
I just know that I know."

lines.name: Voices
lines.flavourText: Only a madman would ignore a god's instructions.

lines.name: Foulborn Inspired Learning

mutatedModifiers.text: If no Notables Allocated in Radius, When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain 1 of its Modifiers for 20 seconds

lines.flavourText:
If you do not learn from a won battle
then you have already lost the war.

lines.name: Foulborn Unnatural Instinct

explicitModifiers.text: Grants all bonuses of Unallocated Small Passive Skills in Radius

mutatedModifiers.text: Allocated Notable Passive Skills in Radius grant nothing

lines.flavourText:
"I don't know how I know, 
I just know that I know."

lines.name: Foulborn The Red Nightmare

mutatedModifiers.text: Fire Damage with Hits is Lucky if you've Blocked an Attack Recently

Passives granting Fire Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant Fire Damage Converted to Chaos Damage at 100% of its value

lines.flavourText:
We coagulate; a crimson shell
that suffocates the unworthy.

lines.name: Foulborn The Red Dream

mutatedModifiers.text: Fire Damage with Hits is Lucky if you've Blocked an Attack Recently

Passives granting Fire Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant increased Maximum Life at 50% of its value

lines.flavourText:
We flow like blood into Chayula's open mouth,
and spill into the land we have watched forever.

lines.name: Foulborn The Red Dream

mutatedModifiers.text: +4% to Chaos Resistance per Endurance Charge

Passives granting Fire Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant increased Maximum Life at 50% of its value

We flow like blood into Chayula's open mouth,
and spill into the land we have watched forever.

lines.name: Foulborn Firesong

mutatedModifiers.text: +(10-15)% to Fire Damage over Time Multiplier
(25-50)% increased Ignite Duration on Enemies

lines.flavourText:
Within a firestorm, the Thane commands the flames
Emblazoned by glory and the song of the First Ones
For the master of fire fears nothing.

lines.name: Foulborn The Blue Dream

mutatedModifiers.text: +3% to Critical Strike Multiplier per Power Charge

Passives granting Lightning Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant increased Maximum Energy Shield at 75% of its value

lines.flavourText:
We crash against Chayula's body,
and fall like rain into the place we cannot go.

lines.name: Foulborn The Blue Nightmare

mutatedModifiers.text: Lightning Damage with Hits is Lucky if you've Blocked Spell Damage Recently

Passives granting Lightning Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant Lightning Damage Converted to Chaos Damage at 100% of its value

lines.flavourText:
We swell and flood
and drown the undeserving beneath our might.

lines.name: Emperor's Mastery

explicitModifiers.text: (5-7)% increased Attributes
4% increased maximum Life
3% increased Character Size
5% increased Global Defences

lines.flavourText:
Learn as much as you can, 
and surround yourself with people who know the rest.

lines.name: Foulborn Ancestral Vision

explicitModifiers.text: Modifiers to Chance to Suppress Spell Damage also apply to Chance to Avoid Elemental Ailments at 50% of their Value

mutatedModifiers.text: +(5-10)% chance to Suppress Spell Damage

lines.flavourText:
The spirits of our ancestors guided us from the Archipelago to the continent.
Inextricably, the purity of our souls is linked to the ones who came before us.

lines.name: Emperor's Might

explicitModifiers.text: (4-6)% increased Strength
10% increased Damage
3% increased Character Size

lines.flavourText: Even an iron fist can be handled with grace.

lines.name: Foulborn Witchbane

explicitModifiers.text: +(5-15) to Intelligence

mutatedModifiers.text: Cursed Enemies you or your Minions Kill have a (10-15)% chance to Explode, dealing a quarter of their maximum Life as Chaos Damage

lines.flavourText:
In darkest night, 'neath waxen moon
A witch snatches a boy from his room.
He wards off her hexes
The witch he perplexes
And so becomes part of her stew.

lines.name: Foulborn Witchbane

mutatedModifiers.text: Cursed Enemies you or your Minions Kill have a (10-15)% chance to Explode, dealing a quarter of their maximum Life as Chaos Damage
Curse Skills have (10-15)% increased Skill Effect Duration

lines.flavourText:
In darkest night, 'neath waxen moon
A witch snatches a boy from his room.
He wards off her hexes
The witch he perplexes
And so becomes part of her stew.

lines.name: Foulborn Ancestral Vision

mutatedModifiers.text: +(5-10)% chance to Suppress Spell Damage
Modifiers to Chance to Suppress Spell Damage also apply to Chance to Defend with 200% of Armour at 50% of their Value

lines.flavourText:
The spirits of our ancestors guided us from the Archipelago to the continent.
Inextricably, the purity of our souls is linked to the ones who came before us.

lines.name: Rational Doctrine

implicitModifiers.text: (3-6)% increased Spell Damage while Dual Wielding
0.2% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life
(3-6)% increased Physical Damage with Maces or Sceptres
(1-3)% increased Cast Speed while wielding a Staff
(1-3)% increased Attack Speed with Maces or Sceptres
Totems gain +(3-5)% to all Elemental Resistances
Attacks have (1-3)% chance to cause Bleeding
-(10-5) Physical Damage taken from Attack Hits
Gain (1-2) Life per Enemy Hit with Attacks
Gain (1-2) Energy Shield per Enemy Hit with Attacks
(1-3)% increased Cast Speed while holding a Shield
(16-20)% chance to Ignore Stuns while Casting
(2-3)% chance to Knock Enemies Back on hit
(1-3)% increased Cast Speed while Dual Wielding
Gain 1 Mana per Enemy Hit with Attacks
(3-6)% increased Spell Damage while wielding a Staff
0.2% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
Minions have +(3-5)% to all Elemental Resistances
0.2% of Spell Damage Leeched as Energy Shield
0.1% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Mana
(3-6)% increased Spell Damage while holding a Shield

explicitModifiers.text:
You have Consecrated Ground around you while
stationary if Strength is your highest Attribute

25% chance to create Profane Ground on Critical
Strike if Intelligence is your highest Attribute
Effects of Consecrated Ground you create Linger for 4 seconds
Effects of Profane Ground you create Linger for 4 seconds

lines.flavourText:
Logic wanes in shining faith, and in rationalism, ardour dims
Thus, the cynic and the zealot are divided
But can they not be one and the same?
